rules.name: Draft-only generation
rules.requirement: Execution creates a Draft Only Expansion Blueprint in state Draft.

rules.name: Human review mandatory
rules.requirement: Compatibility Approved must enter Human Review before Production Eligible.

rules.name: Permission independent
rules.requirement: Production Eligible does not imply Asset Generation Permission.

rules.name: Forbidden content exclusion
rules.requirement: Inheritance Prohibited fields are recorded as exclusions and never copied into inherited output.

rules.name: Reference-only vocabulary
rules.requirement: Blueprint contains references only to existing Character Unit, Material DNA, Palette, Cloud Collar and Production Rules.

rules.name: Invalidation
rules.requiredAction: Return to the earliest affected state and revalidate.
